title: Home
heroIntro: Fenland Running Club helps and encourages adult runners of different abilities, with welcoming club nights, qualified support and a strong community spirit.
sectionTitle: A club for different running journeys
sectionIntro: Whether you are building confidence, returning to running, training for races or looking for a friendly group, Fenland Running Club is here to help you enjoy running.
trainingIntro: Club sessions usually start from Wisbech Rugby Club. Final times and session formats should be confirmed by the club before launch.
newsIntro: Editable news posts are kept in simple content files so volunteers can update them through Pages CMS.
